title: Equal parts of rectangles
description: Practice telling if rectangles are divided into 2, 3, or 4 equal sections.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

This rectangle is divided into $3$ equal parts:  

![A rectangle with 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aa21dd00a645af952fdd9323cd4347e0651cc554)

All of these rectangles are divided into halves:  

![A rectangle with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c4d50054814a2606c83f2890a47ba316e2292180)

![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6be3ed369063d9e09e462e94333d0fd4f3673522)

![A rectangle with 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/184f357683f832b018670b2fbb81fe9479e99f81)

choices.content: ![A rectangle with 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aa21dd00a645af952fdd9323cd4347e0651cc554)
![A rectangle with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c4d50054814a2606c83f2890a47ba316e2292180)
![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6be3ed369063d9e09e462e94333d0fd4f3673522)
![A rectangle with 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/184f357683f832b018670b2fbb81fe9479e99f81)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

This rectangle is divided into $4$ parts:  

![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line and 1 vertical line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3beb6d0b19b0f25cd9cd5c85599073e23a93d5f3)

This rectangle is divided into $2$ pieces, but the pieces are not  equal in size:  

![A rectangle has a vertical line dividing it into 2 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cf31fff9ec9fe45cb8bfed9d661f093ecb3695b0)

These rectangles are divided into halves:  

![A rectangle with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/961cfad82c3629505dc8640dc1e55732c6979519)

![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/319428aac2a57457228c856860dcbb4fc7c5051a)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has a vertical line dividing it into 2 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cf31fff9ec9fe45cb8bfed9d661f093ecb3695b0)
![A rectangle with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/961cfad82c3629505dc8640dc1e55732c6979519)
![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/319428aac2a57457228c856860dcbb4fc7c5051a)
![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line and 1 vertical line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3beb6d0b19b0f25cd9cd5c85599073e23a93d5f3)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which squares are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

This square is divided into $2$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![A square with 1 angled line dividing it into 2 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5099abed14ce5eee03154aa09bd0c356300dbd8e)

This square is not divided into $2$ pieces: 
 
![A square with 1 horizontal line and 1 vertical line dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/06216a7934098a24ac8906e4e89fba83f1e366fd)

These squares are divided into halves:  

![A square with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/92c3d71a0e846dd51c9112499222e02899f66fa4)

![A square with 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4e092c9a6ceed10ff65dcd4b586e4deac5c7533b)

choices.content: ![A square with 1 horizontal line and 1 vertical line dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/06216a7934098a24ac8906e4e89fba83f1e366fd)
![A square with 1 diagonal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/92c3d71a0e846dd51c9112499222e02899f66fa4)
![A square with 1 angled line dividing it into 2 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5099abed14ce5eee03154aa09bd0c356300dbd8e)
![A square with 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4e092c9a6ceed10ff65dcd4b586e4deac5c7533b)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into thirds?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

This rectangle is divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size: 
 
![A rectangle has 2 angled lines going from the top center to the bottom corners dividing it into 3 parts. 2 parts are equal but the third part is larger.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6eca7ed68e627a58d87d9de680959f195737d28)

These rectangles are divided into $4$ pieces:  

![A rectangle with 2 diagonal lines from opposite corners dividing it into 4 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6baac19c2669c59c25e918a0e2a493307575eb36)

![A rectangle with 3 parallel diagonal lines dividing it into 4 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b5a20c1e6195d6a988c0b0e6efa418b6cc4e118e)

This rectangle is divided into thirds:  

![A rectangle has 2 parallel lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/460f2eac392bdb8d9636c3f1a60fc17d6a032344)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 2 parallel lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/460f2eac392bdb8d9636c3f1a60fc17d6a032344)

![A rectangle has 2 angled lines going from the top center to the bottom corners dividing it into 3 parts. 2 parts are equal but the third part is larger.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6eca7ed68e627a58d87d9de680959f195737d28)
![A rectangle with 2 diagonal lines from opposite corners dividing it into 4 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6baac19c2669c59c25e918a0e2a493307575eb36)
![A rectangle with 3 parallel diagonal lines dividing it into 4 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b5a20c1e6195d6a988c0b0e6efa418b6cc4e118e)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into thirds?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

These rectangles are divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ad575f2c28c6752684a1b7a508a29e7ea3f4792)

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6c7c79c233561958b6e84091449ec41d5999f27b)

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6c7c79c233561958b6e84091449ec41d5999f27b)
![A rectangle has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de164ee2744f84c486a47fcbb912a28756a70bd4)
![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ad575f2c28c6752684a1b7a508a29e7ea3f4792)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which squares are divided into thirds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

This square is divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not  equal in size:  

![A square with 2 angled lines across opposite corners dividing it into 3 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e236e9d6a8729d65f0d6bfb0da344fad9f6f34eb)

This square is divided into $4$ parts:  

![A square has 3 horizontal lines dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5d4417e3fe5b2989e17379ffaa85967a59acca77)

These squares are divided into thirds:  

![A square has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/16c953771bc77af1c6db64966cdb81249de8509e)
![A square has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/02531151eddafc9cd09e446727a47712892ad336)

choices.content: ![A square has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/16c953771bc77af1c6db64966cdb81249de8509e)
![A square has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/02531151eddafc9cd09e446727a47712892ad336)
![A square has 3 horizontal lines dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5d4417e3fe5b2989e17379ffaa85967a59acca77)
![A square with 2 angled lines across opposite corners dividing it into 3 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e236e9d6a8729d65f0d6bfb0da344fad9f6f34eb)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in fourths, we divide the whole into **$4$ equal parts**.

These rectangles are not divided into $4$ pieces:  

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 6 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0aad1a1804374804e5560c9d3bda809dbadc0a4)
![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6a8780751b3c6460666c1693afbd7c0e9e559fc2)

These rectangles are divided into fourths:  

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2c7ce490f59aca1ff4cd299d97e9abb6f27cc80a)

![A rectangle has 3 horizontal lines dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de9ffb96b7b818d7283514d4d167e915f7c9dae3)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 6 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0aad1a1804374804e5560c9d3bda809dbadc0a4)
![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6a8780751b3c6460666c1693afbd7c0e9e559fc2)
![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2c7ce490f59aca1ff4cd299d97e9abb6f27cc80a)
![A rectangle has 3 horizontal lines dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de9ffb96b7b818d7283514d4d167e915f7c9dae3)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles are divided into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints: To divide a shape in fourths, we divide the whole into **$4$ equal parts**.

This rectangle is divided into $4$ pieces, but the pieces are not  equal in size:  

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/017c8db7c5f42e50941d95d08644612e1ef20a0f)

These rectangles are divided into fourths:  

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4443ddd49d529942cdc5b1c92754421464ab5c74)
![A rectangle has 3 vertical lines dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/65b4eb38c8880ca3a8423f075a78c78a9589bd1f)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4443ddd49d529942cdc5b1c92754421464ab5c74)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which squares are divided into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in fourths, we divide the whole into **$4$ equal parts**.

This square is divided into $4$ pieces, but the pieces are not  equal in size:  

![A square has 3 parallel diagonal lines dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3734852ede35af22eb1b14f8272c0a440999ba62)

These squares are divided into fourths:  

![A square has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e2a79d9724bad9ec6961c96baaf37253271f042f)

![A square has 2 diagonal lines from opposite corners dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ef7f7f5f177549b2eb025edd1eb633e95bc075e8)

![A square has 3 horizontal lines dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4a7218389d7c42696a5b6610da2d1497c136575f)

choices.content: ![A square has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e2a79d9724bad9ec6961c96baaf37253271f042f)

![A square has 3 parallel diagonal lines dividing it into 4 unequal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3734852ede35af22eb1b14f8272c0a440999ba62)

assessment_items.question_content:
**How is the square divided?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4d120ccf27bd2cc86180b567fa6fda285b25424e)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The square is divided into **$2$ equal parts**.
The square is divided into halves.

choices.content: Halves
Thirds
Fourths

hints:
The rectangle is divided into **$3$ equal parts**.
The rectangle is divided into thirds.

Fourths
Halves

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangles show one half of the shape shaded?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
This rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $2$ pieces shaded.  

![A rectangle has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Two parts are shaded red.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a36900370fb7c7be90e9c7a168a540146b4788c0)

This rectangle has two thirds of the shape shaded.

This rectangle is **not** split into $2$ equal-sized pieces. 

![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 unequal parts. The smallest part is shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/823bc88c2a3560f7fbf6e566878e4c67ebd7fece)

These rectangles are split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{halves}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3fbf22c6e01a686abb3f02af7b1b4728f0c33d0)  ![A rectangle has 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8bd845e5f5ecdfcc3980fa977e79c2a8738d274d)

The rectangles have one half of the shape shaded.

These rectangles have **one half** of the shape shaded:

![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3fbf22c6e01a686abb3f02af7b1b4728f0c33d0)  ![A rectangle has 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8bd845e5f5ecdfcc3980fa977e79c2a8738d274d)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3fbf22c6e01a686abb3f02af7b1b4728f0c33d0)
![A rectangle has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 unequal parts. The smallest part is shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/823bc88c2a3560f7fbf6e566878e4c67ebd7fece)
![A rectangle has 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8bd845e5f5ecdfcc3980fa977e79c2a8738d274d)
![A rectangle has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Two parts are shaded red.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a36900370fb7c7be90e9c7a168a540146b4788c0)

assessment_items.question_content:

This square is **not** split into $3$ equal-sized pieces.

This square has one fourth of the shape shaded.

This square is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A square has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e6b1c68bea47dc97468829f78c4792c037d0cc3d)

This square have one third of the shape shaded.

This square has **one third** of the shape shaded:

![A square has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e6b1c68bea47dc97468829f78c4792c037d0cc3d)

![A square has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Two parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c523fb197a3802dbd83312a7add0904c3c248750)

The square is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6620017d1c4d3bf032f75ad3de14e220aa91a0f)

**What part of the square is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
This square is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{halves}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6620017d1c4d3bf032f75ad3de14e220aa91a0f)

The square has **one half** of the shape shaded.
**One half** of the square is shaded.

choices.content: One half
One one
Two halves

assessment_items.question_content:
The rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/34fbb89e5e2fb7b7e7c388faf6d3e579dd809320)

**What part of the rectangle is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
This rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/34fbb89e5e2fb7b7e7c388faf6d3e579dd809320)

The rectangle has **one third** of the shape shaded.
**One third** of the rectangle is shaded.

choices.content: One third
Two thirds
One half

assessment_items.question_content:

hints:

One third
Three fourths

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which squares show two halves of the shape shaded?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
This square is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{halves}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A square has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/74d84e6ad273d2cf98f2d38aac50abc4ab589cd6)

The square has **one half** of the shape shaded.

This square is not split into equal-sized pieces.

![A square has 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 unequal parts. The larger part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3fc4279d3d885dd3dce9e179f17cd904e160b88d)

These squares are split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{halves}$, with $2$ piece shaded.  

![A square has 1 diagonal line from opposite corners dividing it into 2 equal parts. Two parts are shaded pink.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/750c38314dc3917351b00ce4bb8499fba7030299)
![A square has 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts. Two parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/da4b2d756b1cf58f563a5493d6c9abd62b104fbe)

These squares have **two halves** of the shape shaded.

These squares have **two halves** of the shape shaded:

![A square has 1 diagonal line from opposite corners dividing it into 2 equal parts. Two parts are shaded pink.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/750c38314dc3917351b00ce4bb8499fba7030299)
![A square has 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts. Two parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/da4b2d756b1cf58f563a5493d6c9abd62b104fbe)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangle shows three thirds of the shape shaded?**

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
This rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $2$ pieces shaded.  

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Two parts are shaded red.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/57d8e96e56dcced0061c2f4a994c4cd9006787a5)

The rectangle has **two thirds** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle is not split into equal-sized pieces.

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 unequal parts. The largest part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0c1b0782685779b2c7b84eb77d5e1d269461874)

This rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A rectangle has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/44f9a1cd19242b4240dc6975433a8470906a7b27)

The rectangle has **one third** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $3$ piece shaded.  

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Three parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ac9eca57676a775298749a450f8d486911ab418)

This rectangle has **three thirds** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle has **three thirds** of the shape shaded:

![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Three parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ac9eca57676a775298749a450f8d486911ab418)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Three parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ac9eca57676a775298749a450f8d486911ab418)
![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. Two parts are shaded red.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/57d8e96e56dcced0061c2f4a994c4cd9006787a5)
![A rectangle has 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/44f9a1cd19242b4240dc6975433a8470906a7b27)
![A rectangle has 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 unequal parts. The largest part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0c1b0782685779b2c7b84eb77d5e1d269461874)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which rectangle shows four fourths of the shape shaded?**

[[☃ radio 4]]
hints:
This rectangle is split into $5$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{fifths}$, with $4$ pieces shaded.  

![A rectangle has 4 vertical lines dividing it into 5 equal parts. Four parts are shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/77407dbfbb1262705caa5bc449c971f0fd6a11f7)

The rectangle has **four fifths** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle is not split into equal-sized pieces.

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 unequal parts. The two smaller parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/23a2f4f38dee08482ba2f4b9ac6a5b4a18a01a4e)

This rectangle is split into $4$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{fourths}$, with $2$ pieces shaded.  

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts. Two parts are shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78beea7084ddfdfb7bdf462da32652857641b729)

The rectangle has **two fourths** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle is split into $4$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{fourths}$, with $4$ piece shaded.  

![A rectangle has 3 vertical lines dividing it into 4 equal parts. Four parts are shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/65a3627f4396f6e09efbb0d814c3efa571c0ce83)

This rectangle has **four fourths** of the shape shaded.

This rectangle has **four fourths** of the shape shaded:

![A rectangle has 3 vertical lines dividing it into 4 equal parts. Four parts are shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/65a3627f4396f6e09efbb0d814c3efa571c0ce83)

choices.content: ![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 equal parts. Two parts are shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78beea7084ddfdfb7bdf462da32652857641b729)

![A rectangle has 1 vertical line and 1 horizontal line dividing it into 4 unequal parts. The two smaller parts are shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/23a2f4f38dee08482ba2f4b9ac6a5b4a18a01a4e)
![A rectangle has 3 vertical lines dividing it into 4 equal parts. Four parts are shaded green.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/65a3627f4396f6e09efbb0d814c3efa571c0ce83)
![A rectangle has 4 vertical lines dividing it into 5 equal parts. Four parts are shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/77407dbfbb1262705caa5bc449c971f0fd6a11f7)

assessment_items.question_content:
The rectangle is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f6b1720ee8f1c3418de471c7f81a51d12731ce25)

**What part of the rectangle is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
This rectangle is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or halves. There are $2$ pieces shaded.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f6b1720ee8f1c3418de471c7f81a51d12731ce25)

The rectangle has **two halves** of the shape shaded.
We can describe the rectangle as **two halves**.

choices.content: Two fourths
Two halves
One half
